questions.question: Describe the process of how light rays from an object are focused onto a digital sensor in a camera, resulting in a photometric image. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the role of lenses, apertures, and digital sensors

questions.question: What is the primary difference between a photometric image and a radiometric image? Provide an example to support your answer. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the units of measurement and the context in which they are used

questions.question: An image sensor has a resolution of 1024x768 pixels. What does this mean in terms of the number of pixels that can capture light from an object? (3 marks)
questions.hint: Calculate the total number of pixels
